specific_question: As of October 2024, how are MediConn Solutions' customer service shifts structured?
answer: As of October 2024, MediConn Solutions' customer service shifts ran 9 AM - 6 PM PT on weekdays with staggered start times, plus weekend coverage 10 AM - 4 PM, with representatives working 8-hour shifts.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
